mapper.select: SELECT c.ch_seq, i.cc_gc_seq, i.cc_gc_div, i.cc_gc_code, i.cc_gc_content, i.cc_gc_start_month, i.cc_gc_end_month FROM ( SELECT c.ch_seq, GET_MONTHS_OF_AGE(to_date(c.birth_day,'YYYY-MM-DD')) birthday FROM child c WHERE (c.delete_yn IS NULL OR c.delete_yn != 'Y') AND c.ch_seq = #{childId} ) c JOIN cc_grow_checklist_item i ON (i.delete_yn IS NULL OR i.delete_yn != 'Y') --완료 과업은 전체 출력 (월령별 출력을 원하는 경우, 하단 주석 해제) --AND CAST(i.cc_gc_start_month AS INTEGER) <= c.birthday --AND CAST(i.cc_gc_end_month AS INTEGER) >= c.birthday JOIN child_grow_checklist g ON c.ch_seq = g.ch_seq AND g.cc_gc_seq = i.cc_gc_seq AND (g.delete_yn IS NULL OR g.delete_yn != 'Y') WHERE i.cc_gc_div = #{itemDiv} ORDER BY i.cc_gc_seq, i.cc_gc_start_month

SELECT c.ch_seq, i.cc_gc_seq, i.cc_gc_div, i.cc_gc_code, i.cc_gc_content, i.cc_gc_start_month, i.cc_gc_end_month FROM ( SELECT c.ch_seq, GET_MONTHS_OF_AGE(to_date(c.birth_day,'YYYY-MM-DD')) birthday FROM child c WHERE (c.delete_yn IS NULL OR c.delete_yn != 'Y') AND c.ch_seq = #{childId} ) c JOIN cc_grow_checklist_item i ON (i.delete_yn IS NULL OR i.delete_yn != 'Y') AND CAST(i.cc_gc_start_month AS INTEGER) <= c.birthday AND CAST(i.cc_gc_end_month AS INTEGER) >= c.birthday LEFT JOIN child_grow_checklist g ON c.ch_seq = g.ch_seq AND g.cc_gc_seq = i.cc_gc_seq AND (g.delete_yn IS NULL OR g.delete_yn != 'Y') WHERE g.gc_seq IS NULL AND i.cc_gc_div = #{itemDiv} ORDER BY i.cc_gc_seq
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO child_grow_checklist (ch_seq, cc_gc_seq, gc_date, reg_id, reg_date) VALUES (#{childId}, #{itemId}, #{gcDate}, #{regId}::uuid, NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE child_grow_checklist SET delete_yn = 'Y', delete_id = #{deleteId}::uuid, delete_date = NOW() WHERE ch_seq = #{childId} AND cc_gc_seq = #{itemId} AND (delete_yn IS NULL OR delete_yn != 'Y')
